name: Cookies Credit Card

milestones.label: Monthly fee waiver of ₹100 on monthly spends of ₹5,000 or more
₹1,000 brand voucher on annual spend of ₹2 Lakhs
₹5,000 brand voucher on annual spend of ₹5 Lakhs

milestoneBenefits: Monthly card fee of ₹100 is waived on spending ₹5,000 or more in a calendar month
Earn ₹1,000 brand voucher (Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, Croma, Shoppers Stop) on annual spends of ₹2 Lakhs
Earn ₹5,000 brand voucher (Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, Croma, Shoppers Stop) on annual spends of ₹5 Lakhs
additionalBenefits: 10% instant discount up to ₹300 per month on BookMyShow movie tickets
10% cashback on Zomato, Myntra, and Uber (capped at ₹300 per brand per month, overall cap ₹900/month)
additionalDetails: Redemption fee of ₹99 + GST applies per redemption request via the RBL Rewards portal (rblrewards.rbl.bank.in).
Reward points cannot be redeemed as statement credit against the card bill.
No direct airline miles transfer — points are redeemed for travel bookings and vouchers through the RBL Rewards portal at ₹0.25 per point.
Fuel surcharge waiver of 1% at all fuel stations for transactions between ₹500 and ₹4,000 (Max waiver ₹150/month).
Cashback is applicable only on transactions above ₹100.

voucherRedemptions.programme: Flight & hotel bookings via RBL Rewards portal

salaried: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable income source meeting bank criteria
selfEmployed: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable business income meeting bank criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.
This card has a monthly membership fee model of ₹100 + GST (annual equivalent ₹1,200).
10% cashback on Zomato, Myntra, and Uber has a transaction minimum threshold of ₹100.
